prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年新疆理科worst_rank数据因文件编码问题无法读取，；该校在新疆总招生计划2023–2025年均为50人（含文理）；2026 年§7文件显示理科47人、文科3人，合计50人，总计划与近年持平。理科计划从2025年的约47人（估算）变为2026年的47人，基本持平。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学（含秦皇岛分 校）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第38名，近年排名稳定在36–39名区间，学校层次较高；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及 校区认知问题，无明显负面舆情；抖音热度一般（总排名82）；无投档异常记录；共享东北大学学科评估结果：控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、软件 工程A-、冶金工程A、机械工程A-、材料科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科，对理科考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热 推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）等专业社会热度持续升温；新疆2026年考生总数约238,000人（不确定标记），较2025年约76,548人（文理合计）大幅增加，竞争显著 加剧；东北大学秦皇岛分校位于河北，在新疆招生占比约1.9%（2025年），属跨省招生，地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合招生计划持平、考生规模大幅增加、专业热度升温等因素，预计2026年新疆理科竞争加剧，最低录取位次较2025年有所后移。预测最低位次约14500名，区间14000–15000名 。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 电子信息工程
- 自动化类（自动化、电气工程及其自动化）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 通信工程
- 数学类（数学与应用数学、应用统计学、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 物联网工程
- 机械类（机械工程、车辆工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 材料类（材料成型及控制工程、材料科学与工程、冶金工程、资源勘查工程、环境工程）
- 工商管理类（工商管理、会计学、健康服务与管理）
- 经济学类（经济学、金融学、国际经济与贸易）
- 电子商务
- 信息管理与信息系统
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间14000–15000名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（数学类、通信工程、物联网工程），一档专业（计算机科学与技术、电子信息工程、自动化类）作为冲刺；位次 明显优于区间下限（<14000名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>15000名）建议以三档专业保底。注意材料类属生化环材方向，社会热度明显劝退，报考时需结合 个人兴趣谨慎选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The worst_rank data for Xinjiang Science from 2021–2025 cannot be read due to file encoding issues; the total enrollment plan for this university in Xinjiang from 2023–2025 is 50 students (including both arts and sciences); the 2026 §7 document shows 47 students in Science and 3 in Arts, totaling 50, consistent with recent years. The Science plan changed from approximately 47 students (estimated) in 2025 to 47 in 2026, essentially unchanged.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University (including Qinhuangdao Campus) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is approximately 38th in 2026, with recent rankings stable in the 36–39 range, indicating a high university level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus recognition issues, with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is average (overall rank 82); no abnormal submission records; shares Northeastern University's discipline evaluation results: Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A-, Metallurgical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, totaling 6 disciplines rated A- or above, which strongly attracts Science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended) continue to see rising social popularity; the total number of examinees in Xinjiang in 2026 is approximately 238,000 (uncertain mark), a significant increase from about 76,548 in 2025 (arts and sciences combined), leading to intensified competition; Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is located in Hebei, with a enrollment proportion in Xinjiang of about 1.9% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the unchanged enrollment plan, a significant increase in the number of examinees, and rising major popularity, competition in Xinjiang Science in 2026 is expected to intensify, with the minimum admission ranking shifting backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14,500, with a range of 14,000–15,000.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Communication Engineering
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Applied Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Internet of Things Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials (Material Forming and Control Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering, Environmental Engineering)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting, Health Service and Management)
- Economics (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- E-commerce
- Information Management and Information Systems
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 14,000–15,000, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mathematics, Communication Engineering, Internet of Things Engineering) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Information Engineering, Automation) as a stretch; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<14,000), focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the upper limit (>15,000), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Note that Materials majors fall under the biology, chemistry, environment, and materials fields, which have low social popularity, so choose carefully based on personal interest when applying.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年新疆文科worst_rank数据因文件编码问题无法读取，；2026年§7文件显示文科仅招生3人（民族学2人、外国语言文学类 1人），较近年总计划50人中的文科份额明显缩减，属大幅缩招，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学（含秦皇岛分校）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科排名约第38名。 2026年声誉评价中性/混合；抖音热度一般；无投档异常记录。；外国语言文学类社会热度一般观望（外语类2024年评估为一般观望）；新疆2026年考生总数大幅增加，文科考生规模预计扩 大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 跨省招生，占比约1.9%，地域偏好不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合文科招生计划大幅缩减（仅3人）、考生规模扩大等因素，预计2026年新疆文科竞争极为 激烈，最低录取位次将明显前移。预测最低位次约1500名，区间1400–1600名。

一档（最难进）
- 民族学
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 文科仅招2个专业共3人，招生规模极小，竞争极为激烈。位次在预测区间1400–1600名内，建议以民族学为一档冲刺、外国语言文学类为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<1400名 ）可尝试冲刺民族学；位次接近区间上限（>1600名）录取概率较低，建议考虑其他院校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Xinjiang Liberal Arts worst_rank data cannot be read due to file encoding issues; the 2026 §7 file shows only 3 students enrolled in Liberal Arts (2 in Ethnology, 1 in Foreign Languages and Literature), a significant reduction from the recent total plan of 50, indicating a substantial enrollment cut and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University (including Qinhuangdao Campus) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 38th by Soft Science. 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity is average; no abnormal admission records. Foreign Languages and Literature has average social popularity (rated as average in 2024 for foreign language majors); the total number of Xinjiang 2026 examinees has increased significantly, and the scale of Liberal Arts examinees is expected to expand.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Cross-province enrollment, accounting for about 1.9%, with no significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant reduction in Liberal Arts enrollment plan (only 3 students) and the increase in examinee numbers, competition for Xinjiang Liberal Arts in 2026 is expected to be extremely fierce, with the minimum admission rank moving significantly forward. Predicted minimum rank is approximately 1500, with a range of 1400–1600.

- Foreign Languages and Literature (English, Japanese)

For ranks within the predicted range of 1400–1600, it is recommended to aim for Ethnology as a Tier 1 sprint and Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety; for ranks significantly better than the lower limit (<1400), try sprinting for Ethnology; for ranks near the upper limit (>1600), admission probability is low, and other universities should be considered.
